data.title: Waterdrop Inc. released 2024 ESG Report; Provided rural medical clinic access to over 500K beneficiaries.
data.description: Waterdrop Inc. unveiled its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report on September 25, 2025. The report provides a detailed analysis of the company's advancements and projects in corporate governance and technology. The release showcases the significant strides made by Waterdrop Inc. in these areas over the past year.

data.title: HIVE Digital stock jumps 5% after hours as it captures 2% of Bitcoin mining network, achieves 20 Exahash/s capacity.
data.description: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd.'s (NASDAQ: HIVE) shares surged post-market on Wednesday as the data center announced it had achieved 2% of the worldwide Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining capacity. As of the latest update, the stock was trending upward. HIVE saw a notable increase in its stock price today, continuing an upward trend. The company witnessed a rise of over 5% in after-hours trading, adding to gains made during the regular session, with closing levels not seen since early December 2024. In a significant milestone, HIVE reported surpassing 20 Exahash per second of global mining capacity. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jeju Green Tea Cooperative 'Sumang' to enter global market with premium Hojicha and Matcha from Jeju; focusing on direct-to-consumer sales.
data.description: Located in Jeju, South Korea, Sumang is increasing its international footprint and sales directly to consumers by offering premium organic green tea products. Specifically, they are introducing Hojicha, a high-quality green tea, and matcha from Jeju to the market. This expansion will enable Sumang to reach a wider audience and tap into the growing demand for luxury tea products globally.

data.title: Natural Nine in South Korea launches new Leoclean product to expand globally, aiming to penetrate more markets.
data.description: Natural Nine, a healthcare and beauty expert based in Hwaseong, South Korea, has announced the launch of a new product for their brand, Leoclean. This strategic move aims to boost the brand's presence in international markets and enhance its global reach.

BYD Surpasses Tesla in EU EV Sales for Second Month Chinese EV maker BYD sold three times as many new cars in the European Union in August compared with the same month in 2024, surpassing Tesla for the second consecutive month, according to ACEA data. BYD’s sales rose 201.3%,

data.title: Immuneering prices $175 million public offering and $25 million private placement of Class A common stock.
data.description: Biotech company Immuneering has disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering of Class A Common Stock, totaling $175 million, and a concurrent private placement of Class A shares amounting to $25 million.

data.title: Rising crypto treasury buybacks reflect a 'credibility race', with companies vying to offer attractive setups - Kadan Stadelmann.
data.description: Kadan Stadelmann, the CTO of Komodo Platform, mentioned to a news outlet that treasury firms are currently striving to develop the most appealing setup, as reported by Cointelegraph.
